overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European harbor town with stone Gothic architecture and cobblestone streets. The character moves from a church square along the waterfront promenade past wooden docks and moored boats, eventually approaching a group of guards near a stone archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden structure and stone church

events.description: emerges from narrow passage into open waterfront promenade area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along cobblestone path from a narrow wooden structure toward the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking in the opposite direction along the path
dock worker sitting on wooden platform near the water

entered.detail: large Gothic stone church with tall arched windows and steeply pitched roof
rough timber scaffolding and staircase attached to building facade
irregular stone paving with patches of grass growing between stones

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow passage between a wooden staircase structure and stone buildings, opening up to reveal a large Gothic church on the left. Geralt walks forward along the cobblestone street toward the waterfront, passing a woman in a dress and a dock worker resting by the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with docked sailing vessels

events.description: slight right turn to follow the curving path of the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade passing wooden dock structures and moored boats

notable_agents.action: muscular shirtless dock worker walking along the stone embankment

entered.detail: tall wooden A-frame crane with rope and pulley system for loading cargo onto boats
small wooden sailing vessel with furled canvas sails moored at the dock
row of connected medieval stone buildings with red tile roofs and wooden shutters

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open waterfront promenade, the camera passes wooden A-frame cargo cranes and a moored sailing boat on the right. Stone buildings with red tile roofs line the left side while Geralt walks past a dock worker, the cobblestone path curving gently along the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy dock area with fishing equipment and cargo storage

events.description: passing large stacks of canvas-wrapped cargo bales and fishing traps on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dockside path passing cargo and fishing gear

entered.detail: large cylindrical bales wrapped in tan canvas and secured with heavy rope
stacks of round woven wooden traps for catching crustaceans
tall stone defensive tower with conical red roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The waterfront path continues past fishing equipment including stacked lobster traps and large canvas cargo bales. The wooden crane structure moves closer on the right while a distant watch tower with a red conical roof becomes visible ahead, marking the approach to a more fortified area of the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dockside entrance with stone archway and ship construction

events.description: approaching group of guards in red uniforms standing near stone archway
entering darker stone archway passage following the guards

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through a stone archway while following guards in red uniforms

notable_agents.action: group of three guards in red uniforms with weapons walking ahead through the archway

entered.detail: large Gothic stone archway entrance with pointed arch leading to darker interior passage
extensive timber scaffolding and framework surrounding a ship under construction
large wooden cargo ship with high sides moored at the construction dock

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a group of guards in red uniforms standing before a large stone archway. Geralt follows them through the arch into a darker passage, passing extensive wooden scaffolding where a large cargo vessel is under construction. The environment shifts from bright open waterfront to a more enclosed, shadowed area with construction materials scattered on the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow town passage through a bright harbor promenade and into a shadowed construction zone. It begins in a tight corridor between stone buildings and a wooden staircase, opening up to reveal a large Gothic church as Geralt walks along a cobblestone street past local townspeople. As the path curves along the waterfront, the scene expands to show red-tiled roofs on the left and moored sailing boats and A-frame cargo cranes on the right. The camera then continues past stacked lobster traps and canvas cargo bales, with the horizon shifting toward a distant watch tower with a red conical roof. Finally, the bright open air gives way to a darker, enclosed environment as Geralt passes a group of guards and enters a stone archway filled with wooden scaffolding and the hull of a vessel under construction.
